zh.lifeSummary: 當Ceclia Braose於1334年出生在英國諾福爾可托普可洛福特時，她的父親Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr28歲，母親Lady Agnes Eva de Ufford24歲。她於1354年與William Kerdeston在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1401年享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可利法姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ceclia Braose于1334年出生在英国諾福爾可托普可洛福特时，她的父亲Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr28岁，母亲Lady Agnes Eva de Ufford24岁。她于1354年与William Kerdeston在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1401年享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可利法姆。

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Ceclia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ceclia Braose was born in 1334, in Topcroft, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr, was 28 and her mother, Lady Agnes Eva de Ufford, was 24. She married William Kerdeston in 1354, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1401, at the age of 67, and was buried in Reepham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ceclia Braose est née en 1334, à Topcroft, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Eva de Ufford, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé William Kerdeston en 1354, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1401, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Reepham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ceclia Braose 1334 in Topcroft, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes Eva de Ufford 24. Sie hat 1354 in England William Kerdeston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1401 im Alter von 67 Jahren und wurde in Reepham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ceclia Braose è nata il nel 1334 nel Topcroft, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes Eva de Ufford, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato William Kerdeston nel 1354, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1401, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Reepham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ceclia Braoseが1334年にイギリスノーフォルクトプクロフトで生まれた時，父Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Srは28歳，母Lady Agnes Eva de Uffordは24歳であった。1354年にイギリスでWilliam Kerdestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1401年に67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクレエファムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ceclia Braose(이)가 1334년 영국 노르폴크 토p크로프트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes Eva de Ufford(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1354년 영국에서 William Kerdeston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1401년 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리프아에 묻혔다.

mn.Reepham, Norfolk, England: Reepham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ceclia Braose nasceu em 1334, em Topcroft, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Eva de Ufford, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com William Kerdeston em 1354, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1401, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Reepham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ceclia Braose родилась в 1334 г. в местности топкрофт, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Eva de Ufford, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Kerdeston в 1354 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1401 г. в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности рифам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ceclia Braose nació en 1334, en Topcroft, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Eva de Ufford, tenía 24 años. Se casó con William Kerdeston en 1354, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1401, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Reepham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
